rows.label: qev010801_MSG0001
rows.name:
We got an order to go check out a cave up north...
Man, it's such a pain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh, you're a BLADE too, right?
Did you get stuck with any annoying missions over there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0011
rows.name: Complain to Carl that you have a troublesome mission.

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0020
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0021
rows.name: Reprimand Carl for his lazy attitude.

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm getting a strong scent from you that
you're exactly like me.
Looks like we could be good complaining buddies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Oh, right! I want you to listen to
my complaints right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're a serious one, aren't you?
Don't you get tired being so high-strung?
You should try relaxing your shoulders a bit, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Oh, right! How about you listen to
my story as a little breather?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0007
rows.name:
Man, about the mission details...
It seems monsters have made a nest in the cave
we were told to check out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0008
rows.name:
They said it'd be dangerous to leave them alone,
so depending on the situation, we're supposed to
exterminate them all at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ugh... What a total pain...
Trevor-san always dumps way too much
ridiculous work on me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ahh, couldn't someone just pop over
and clear out the monsters for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Ah, our eyes just met, didn't they?
Don't tell me you're totally willing to
take on this job in my place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Seriously? You'll really go?!
Wow, it never hurts to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0014
rows.name:
In that case, just go take a look for me!
The monster nest should be a little ways north
after you exit the West Gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0015
rows.name:
I mean, those monsters were living here
before us Earthlings arrived, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0016
rows.name:
And yet we come in later and just exterminate them
for our own convenience...
Is that really okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0017
rows.name:
Honestly, it's such a troublesome mission...
Well... anyway, please go check out the monster nest
north of the West Gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Good work out there!
So, what happened with those monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Eh?
You exterminated the baby monsters, the parents showed up...
and you killed the parents too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ugh... Killing parents who came to save their kids...
Isn't that a little cruel?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0021
rows.name:
They were living here as a family
before we even got here, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0022
rows.name:
And yet we show up and kill them off
just for our own convenience...
I feel like that's messed up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0031
rows.name: Agree with Carl's opinion.

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0041
rows.name:
Declare that native creatures are enemies of humanity
and must be exterminated.

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0023
rows.name: Man, this is such a downer...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Whoa! You have zero pangs of conscience, [ST:playername ]-san?
I don't think I can keep up with you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ah, well, I did ask you to do it,
so I'll still pay you your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Sigh...
What a mission with a terrible aftertaste...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0027
rows.name:
Good work out there!
So, what happened with those monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0028
rows.name: ...Ah, you let them go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Yeah, even if they're monsters, killing their kids
is a bit too pitiful, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0051
rows.name: Agree with Carl's opinion.

rows.label: qev010801_JNK0060
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev010801_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask if the mission will be okay.

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm so glad I asked a kind person
like you, [ST:playername ]-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0031
rows.name:
Well, I'll figure something out on my end.
Since we're dealing with kids, there are plenty of ways to handle it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0032
rows.name:
Here, it's not much,
but take this stuff I swiped from the warehouse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0033
rows.name:
Leave the rest to me.
I'll quickly consult with Trevor-san, my senior BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010801_MSG0034
rows.name:
Thank you so much!
Hehe! Doing a good deed
feels surprisingly refreshing![ST:wait ]
